name: claude-for-codex
description: Call Claude Code from Codex for a second opinion, code review, research, a diff review, or to make and verify a fix. Read-only by default; --access write lets Claude edit.

interface.shortDescription: Consult Claude Code from Codex (review / research / fix)
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex call Claude Code as a peer. You write the request in --prompt; Claude gets the full toolset with no allow/deny list. Read-only by default (Claude is told not to modify); --access write lets it edit and verify. Point --cwd at a repo to give Claude its code and MCP servers.
